'''旧暦3月13日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[1132年]]_月_日） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[1704年]]_月_日） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により宝永に改元 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - [[壬生浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が京都守護職・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の無血開城を決定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（[[1192年]]_月_日） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * （[[1372年]]_月_日） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（[[1578年]]_月_日） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月12日 (旧暦)|3月12日]] 翌日[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]] - 前月[[2月13日 (旧暦)|2月13日]] 翌月[[4月13日 (旧暦)|4月13日]] *新暦[[3月13日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[壬生浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が京都守護職・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ_Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar March}} '''Lunar March13日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

{{Lunar March}} '''March 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 13'''<!--Lunar March13--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== Events == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== Deaths == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

{{Lunar March}} '''March 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 13'''<!--Lunar March13 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== Deaths == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

[[sn:March 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[長承]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1132]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1704]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902]]）
== Deaths == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1372]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530]]）
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[4月7日]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[4月16日]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[4月18日]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[4月5日]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[4月12日]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、[[武将]] 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[4月26日]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[4月26日]] ） - [[後白河天皇]] 、77代[[天皇]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5年/{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[4月17日]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[上杉謙信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、[[武将]] 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[後白河天皇]] 、77代[[天皇]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5年/{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[上杉謙信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定

[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、[[武将]] 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[天皇]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5年/{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[上杉謙信]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[天皇]]" to "[[Emperor of Japan]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[武士]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大地震により、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[西郷隆盛]] と[[勝海舟]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[思想家]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5年/{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[上杉謙信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .

== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5年/{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[上杉謙信]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）

[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[Samurai]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大Earthquakeにより、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[Saigō Takamori]] と[[Katsu Kaishū]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5th year /{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Uesugi Kenshin]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）

[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[Samurai]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大Earthquakeにより、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[Saigō Takamori]] と[[Katsu Kaishū]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[佐賀藩]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5th year /{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Uesugi Kenshin]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）

[[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[Samurai]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大Earthquakeにより、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[Saigō Takamori]] と[[Katsu Kaishū]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[Saga Domain]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5th year /{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Uesugi Kenshin]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1132]] [[April 7]] ） - [[平忠盛]] が、[[Samurai]] として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[April 16]] ） - 前年11月のGenroku大Earthquakeにより、[[Genroku]] から宝永に[[改元]] * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 18]] ） - [[浪士組]] のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]] ら24名が[[京都守護職]] ・[[松平容保]] の配下に取立てられる * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 5]] ） - [[Saigō Takamori]] と[[Katsu Kaishū]] が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]] の[[江戸開城|無血開城]] を決定
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1538]] [[April 12]] ） - [[鍋島直茂]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} 、[[Saga Domain]] の藩祖（+ [[1618]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[April 26]] ） - [[西村茂樹]] 、[[啓蒙]] [[Thinker]] （+ [[1902]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 5th year /{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Uesugi Kenshin]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category: pages]] [[Category:deprecated s front]] [[Category:deprecated s back]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月十三]] [[en:draft:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 13 (Lunisolar)]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1192]] [[April 26]] ） - [[Emperor Go-Shirakawa]] 、77代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1127]] ） * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安|12=draft}} 5th year /{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1372]] [[April 17]] ） - [[頓阿]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=draft}} （* [[1289]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Uesugi Kenshin]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （* [[1530]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1132]] {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日}}) – {{ill|Taira Tadamori|ja|平忠盛}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1704]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 18|ja|4月18日}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1538]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|ja|鍋島直茂}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[1618]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1828]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|ja|西村茂樹}}, an enlightenment thinker (died [[1902]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1192]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[1127]]).

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|ja|長承|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1132]] {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日}}) – {{ill|Taira Tadamori|ja|平忠盛}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1704]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 18|ja|4月18日}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[Tenbun]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1538]] {{ill|April 12|ja|4月12日}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|ja|鍋島直茂}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[1618]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1828]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|ja|西村茂樹}}, an enlightenment thinker (died [[1902]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1192]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1192]] {{ill|April 26|ja|4月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇|12=draft}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[1127]]).

20 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:3月13日 (旧暦) up to rev 83353658
revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月13日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月13日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の13日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[長承]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1132年]][[4月7日]]） - [[平忠盛]]が、[[武士]]として初めて御所への昇殿を許可される * [[宝永]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1704年]][[4月16日]]） - 前年11月の元禄大地震により、[[元禄]]から宝永に[[改元]] * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月18日]]） - [[浪士組]]のうち京都に残留した[[芹沢鴨]]ら24名が[[京都守護職]]・[[松平容保]]の配下に取立てられる * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月5日]]） - [[西郷隆盛]]と[[勝海舟]]が江戸で会見。翌日、[[江戸城]]の[[江戸開城|無血開城]]を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（ユリウス暦[[1538年]][[4月12日]]） - [[鍋島直茂]]、[[武将]]、[[佐賀藩]]の藩祖（+ [[1618年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[4月26日]]） - [[西村茂樹]]、[[啓蒙]][[思想家]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建久]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1192年]][[4月26日]]） - [[後白河天皇]]、77代[[天皇]]（* [[1127年]]） * [[応安]]5年/[[文中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1372年]][[4月17日]]） - [[頓阿]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1289年]]） * [[天正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1578年]][[4月19日]]） - [[上杉謙信]]、[[武将]]（* [[1530年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839192]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 13|qq=March 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōshō|Chōshō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1132|1132]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – [[:en:Taira no Tadamori|Taira Tadamori]] was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōshō|Chōshō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1132|1132]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – [[:en:Taira no Tadamori|Taira Tadamori]] was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839192]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 13|qq=March 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōshō|Chōshō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1132|1132]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – [[:en:Taira no Tadamori|Taira Tadamori]] was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]]
{{translated page|ja|3月13日 (旧暦)|version=83353658|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月十三]]
[[ar:March 13 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] {{wikidata link|Q839192}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839192]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 13|qq=March 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōshō|Chōshō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1132|1132]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – [[:en:Taira no Tadamori|Taira Tadamori]] was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839192]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 13|qq=March 13}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōshō|Chōshō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1132|1132]] [[:en:April 7|April 7]]) – [[:en:Taira no Tadamori|Taira Tadamori]] was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1704|1704]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Nabeshima Naoshige|Nabeshima Naoshige]], a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died [[:en:1618|1618]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Nishimura Shigeki|Nishimura Shigeki]], an enlightenment thinker (died [[:en:1902|1902]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 26|April 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1127|1127]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十三]][[zh:三月十三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839192]] Wikidata name: 13th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 13|qq=March 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|WD=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|WD=Q19582|lt=1132}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|WD=Q3083805|lt=Taira Tadamori}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|WD=Q6824|lt=1704}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|en|Nabeshima Naoshige|WD=Q1039095|lt=Nabeshima Naoshige}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died {{ill|1618|en|1618|WD=Q6801|lt=1618}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|en|Nishimura Shigeki|WD=Q3022461|lt=Nishimura Shigeki}}, an enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|en|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]]
{{translated page|ja|3月13日 (旧暦)|version=83353658|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:March 13 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 3월 13일]] [[ja:3月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月十三]]
[[ar:March 13 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十三]] {{wikidata link|Q839192}} [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|WD=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|WD=Q19582|lt=1132}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|WD=Q3083805|lt=Taira Tadamori}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|WD=Q6824|lt=1704}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|en|Nabeshima Naoshige|WD=Q1039095|lt=Nabeshima Naoshige}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died {{ill|1618|en|1618|WD=Q6801|lt=1618}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|en|Nishimura Shigeki|WD=Q3022461|lt=Nishimura Shigeki}}, an enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|WD=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|WD=Q19582|lt=1132}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|WD=Q3083805|lt=Taira Tadamori}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|WD=Q6824|lt=1704}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|en|Nabeshima Naoshige|WD=Q1039095|lt=Nabeshima Naoshige}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died {{ill|1618|en|1618|WD=Q6801|lt=1618}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|en|Nishimura Shigeki|WD=Q3022461|lt=Nishimura Shigeki}}, an enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|en|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|12|3|14|2|13|4|3|0313|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|WD=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō|1=Chōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|WD=Q19582|lt=1132|1=1132}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|WD=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|WD=Q3083805|lt=Taira Tadamori|1=Taira no Tadamori}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|WD=Q6824|lt=1704|1=1704}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|WD=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|WD=Q2521|lt=April 18|1=April 18}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|WD=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|en|Nabeshima Naoshige|WD=Q1039095|lt=Nabeshima Naoshige|1=Nabeshima Naoshige}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died {{ill|1618|en|1618|WD=Q6801|lt=1618|1=1618}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|en|Nishimura Shigeki|WD=Q3022461|lt=Nishimura Shigeki|1=Nishimura Shigeki}}, an enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|WD=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|en|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|WD=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127|1=1127}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 13''' is the 13th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|qid=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō|1=Chōshō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1132|en|1132|qid=Q19582|lt=1132|1=1132}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|qid=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|qid=Q3083805|lt=Taira Tadamori|1=Taira no Tadamori}} was, for the first time as a samurai, granted permission to ascend to the imperial palace. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|qid=Q6824|lt=1704|1=1704}} {{ill|April 16|en|April 16|qid=Q2519|lt=April 16|1=April 16}}) – Following the Genroku great earthquake in November of the previous year, the era name was changed from Genroku to {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|April 18|en|April 18|qid=Q2521|lt=April 18|1=April 18}}) – Among the rōnin, 24 members who remained in Kyoto as part of the 【Rōshigumi】 were taken into service under the Kyoto Shugo and under Matsudaira Katamori. * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – Saigō Takamori and Katsu Kaishū held a meeting in Edo; the following day, the peaceful surrender of Edo Castle was decided.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|qid=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naoshige|en|Nabeshima Naoshige|qid=Q1039095|lt=Nabeshima Naoshige|1=Nabeshima Naoshige}}, a military commander and founder of the Saga Domain (died {{ill|1618|en|1618|qid=Q6801|lt=1618|1=1618}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|qid=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Nishimura Shigeki|en|Nishimura Shigeki|qid=Q3022461|lt=Nishimura Shigeki|1=Nishimura Shigeki}}, an enlightenment thinker (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|qid=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}} {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|qid=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|en|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qid=Q317984|lt=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa}}, the 77th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1127|en|1127|qid=Q23827|lt=1127|1=1127}}).
